overall.description: A static first-person view from a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a dimly lit apartment bedroom with rumpled sheets overlooking a rainy, neon-lit cityscape through a large window. The scene maintains a moody, atmospheric tone with green and blue ambient lighting throughout.

dark wall with checkerboard or geometric tile pattern

green and blue neon signs visible through the rain outside

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a large window at a rain-soaked city night. The room features rumpled metallic sheets on the bed in the foreground, a patterned wall to the left with white furniture, and atmospheric neon lighting from outside. The camera remains completely still throughout, capturing the ambient mood of the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective from within a cyberpunk bedroom that gazes out upon a rain-soaked urban night. It begins with a focus on the immediate interior, where rumpled metallic sheets on a bed occupy the foreground beside a patterned wall and white furniture. As the eye moves toward the large window, the dim indoor lighting blends with the vibrant neon glow of the city outside. The scene remains fixed in this moody composition, capturing the steady fall of rain against the backdrop of a glowing, futuristic cityscape.
